title: Beach Cleanup Volunteer
description: Join a local beach cleanup. Help remove plastic and debris, log your bags collected, and get AI-verified impact.

title: 7-Day Plastic-Free Challenge
description: Avoid single-use plastic for one week. Use reusable bags, bottles, and containers. Log daily wins for verification.

title: Tree Planting Day
description: Plant trees at a council or community event. Document with a photo and description for AI verification.

title: Green Commute Week
description: Replace car trips with bus, bike, or walking for 5 days. Log each trip to earn verified CO₂ savings.

title: Campus Recycling Ambassador
description: Lead a small recycling awareness activity on campus: put up posters, share tips, or run a short workshop.

title: Tree Planting Day
description: Community tree planting with Brisbane City Council. All equipment provided.

title: Eco-Tech Workshop
description: Learn about solar, EVs, and smart home energy. Hands-on demos and expert Q&A.

title: Zero Waste Seminar
description: Online seminar on reducing waste at home and in the office. Free registration.

title: River Cleanup Challenge
description: City-wide cleanup along the Brisbane River. Compete by suburb for the Green Neighborhood Grant.
